---
title: "ICS DNS interest rate model with Taiwan Treasury yield data"
author: "Kelvin Wong"
date: "2026-05-18"
categories: [modeling, actuarial, risk management]
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

![](thumbnail.jpg)

Since this post doesn't specify an explicit `image`, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.
